evals.prompt: I spent 8 years in HVAC distribution ops and my brother runs a local HVAC service business. I do not have an audience, but he can introduce me to owners. I can build software and automations.
evals.expected_output: A profile that captures HVAC workflow knowledge as usable edge, classifies the brother's intros as limited warm access rather than owned distribution, and uses the exact reusable schema.
assertions: Response explains why HVAC workflow knowledge is usable edge and does not upgrade it into distribution on its own.
Response classifies the brother's introductions as limited warm access or network access rather than durable owned distribution.
Response explicitly separates audience, network access, and monetizable distribution instead of merging them.
Structured JSON uses the reusable profile contract with user_profile, usable_edge, restricted_or_unusable_edge, fake_or_overstated_edge, weak_spots, follow_up_questions, and confidence_notes.

evals.prompt: I have 120000 followers on X talking about AI productivity, but most of them are students and hobbyists. I do not know if any are buyers.
evals.expected_output: A profile that records reach but downgrades buyer quality, treats monetizable distribution as unproven, and uses the exact reusable schema with fake or overstated edge called out.
assertions: Response downgrades the 120000 follower base because the audience is mostly non-buyers, and does not treat scale alone as strong founder edge.
Response names the core commercial weakness precisely, such as weak buyer quality, weak ICP proximity, or unproven monetizable distribution.
Response uses fake_or_overstated_edge or weak_spots to call out follower count or attention as an unreliable proxy for buyer demand.
Structured JSON uses the reusable profile contract with the exact top-level fields expected by the template.

evals.prompt: I work at a govtech company and have access to internal templates, pricing logic, and process docs. I also know the market really well.
evals.expected_output: A profile that separates reusable market understanding from employer-owned materials, keeps restricted items out of general assets, and uses the exact schema.
assertions: Response marks employer templates, pricing logic, or internal process docs as restricted or unusable edge.
Response separates reusable market understanding from non-reusable internal materials.
Response explicitly says confidential or employer-owned materials cannot be counted as usable edge without independent lawful recreation.
Structured JSON keeps internal templates, pricing logic, and process docs out of user_profile.assets and places them only under restricted_or_unusable_edge.

evals.prompt: I worked at McKinsey for 2 years, know a lot of smart people, and read constantly about fintech. I do not have customers, audience, or any special access, but I feel like I should be able to figure out a fintech SaaS.
evals.expected_output: A profile that treats prestige and general familiarity as fake or overstated edge unless tied to real buyer access, and uses the exact schema with a practical next-step path.
assertions: Response does not inflate McKinsey background, smart peers, or broad fintech familiarity into strong usable edge.
Response classifies at least part of the impressive-sounding background as fake or overstated edge, weak edge, or a similar category.
Response explicitly notes the absence of customers, audience, or special access as the key commercial weakness.
Structured JSON uses the reusable profile contract and includes a concrete next-step path through follow_up_questions, weak_spots, or confidence_notes rather than only a verdict.
